description:

☆ AnyPOV Artist!user x Hockey Player!char ☆

⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆  ─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆

Jax feels as if he has been losing his mind trying to figure out who the hell User is.

He was enchanted with the artwork that bore their signature at first glance, a name he had never heard at BVU before.

Each day that passes that he can't find them, his innocent obsession grows a little more.
